gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found that descriptor fingerprints ignored member-descriptor ownership, allowing a foreign slot descriptor mutation to pass as pristine. I added descriptor-owner fingerprinting, covered the foreign descriptor case, reran verification, and re-review returned approval.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_benchmark_plan_executor.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_release_bundle.py -q
what_changed: Hardened restaurant_kv_serving.benchmark_plan_executor so BenchmarkCommandResult is selected from the live public module only when the public class is pristine.
Added source-default fallback detection for public result-class replacement, property mutation, and foreign slot-descriptor mutation before legacy import.
Added import-order regression tests while preserving clean-import public class identity.
why: Benchmark orchestration needs legacy wrapper monkeypatch compatibility without capturing pre-import document namespace mutations as defaults.
